allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: M3-003 is pushed. This scope implements M3-004 cancel/resume around checkpoint artifact writing, checkpoint DB recording, job cancel API behavior, train resume guard, child train Job creation, and JobResource current-link rebinding. Route/schema edits are limited to wiring the pre-existing OpenAPI seed contract at runtime.

phase_notes.plan: Implement M3-004 only: cancel queued/running jobs, checkpoint writer with atomic temp-to-rename artifact creation, Checkpoint row recording, resume guard errors, child train Job creation, AuditEvent resume details, and JobResource current-link rebinding. Keep DB schema, dataset retry rules, trainer runtimes, and M3-005 dry-run/OOM out of scope.
